name: pi-ultraplan
description_en: Provider-agnostic ultraplan engine for Pi — fan-out planning, adversarial verification, structured plans, worktree-isolated execution. Reference adapter: fairy-tales-deepseek-openai / deepseek-v4-pro.
description_zh: Pi 的提供商无关的超计划引擎 — 扇出规划、对抗性验证、结构化计划、工作区隔离执行。参考适配器：fairy-tales-deepseek-openai / deepseek-v4-pro。
